title: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF SALEM, MARION AND POLK COUNTIES BOYS & GIRLS CLUB Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a positive space for youth to engage in fun and empowering programs, such as leadership and community service, after-school programs, academic enrichment, workforce training, performing and visual arts, camps, and personal health and fitness. 1395 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Grades 1-5, teen center 6-12 years old Hours: Varies Email (503) 581-7383 1010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 581-7383 Main phone Main phone (503) 581-7383 ext 1010 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25 annual membership fee, plus $30 monthly fee, additional fees for summer camps DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Program hours vary between school year and summer. TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of Summer and Hood Streets Services: Boys/Girls Clubs Camps Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND DENTAL SERVICES LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - HEALTH AND FITNESS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
